steps.name: Scratch project setup
steps.expected: scratch dir created, contains a 3-file TS project
steps.actual: scratch dir created with package.json + tsconfig.json + src/index.ts

steps.name: Verify hook installed in .claude/settings.json
steps.expected: parse-clean JSON, yakcc PreToolUse entry present pointing to hook-intercept
steps.actual: PreToolUse entry with yakcc hook-intercept command found

steps.name: Substitution trigger simulation (known-match.ts)
steps.expected: substitution fires OR synthesis-required (registry may be empty) — response kind recorded

steps.name: yakcc_resolve MCP tool surface
steps.expected: yakccResolve returns valid envelope; absent hash → no_match

steps.name: yakcc query returns seed atoms after seeding
steps.expected: at least one candidate returned for 'parse json int list', top-1 is a recognizable atom
steps.actual: 5 candidates; top behavior="Parse a string of the form '[i1,i2,...,iN]' where each element is a non-negative" plausible=true

steps.name: Shape-filter graceful rejection on generic-typed code (novel-glue.ts / chunkArray)
steps.expected: substitution=false (no match), atomize skipped (generic type param declined by static strategy), non-fatal
steps.actual: substituted=false, atomized=true (unexpected but not wrong), atoms=[chunkArray], @atom-new present=true

steps.name: LOAD-BEARING: flywheel atomization (novel-glue-flywheel.ts / arrayMedian)
steps.expected: substitution=false, atomized=true, atomsCreated non-empty, @atom-new comment emitted

steps.name: LOAD-BEARING round-trip: query registry for arrayMedian atom created in Step 8b
steps.expected: top-K candidates include the BMR from Step 8b; top-1 combinedScore >= 0.70 (CONFIDENT_THRESHOLD)
steps.actual: 5 candidates; BMR[c8b64955] in top-K=true; top-1 combinedScore=0.8954 (threshold=0.7, confident=true); behavior="b73a771f7e58fcc15fc3197a9f37c500d2fda5ee5bd32a764692d2ca68686724"
